evidence_hint: src/reconcile_fields.ts:74/77 and src/assist.ts:48-50 fall back to heuristic/seed when adapter.classify absent or returns null; recorded FieldDiff reason (reconcile_fields.ts:126-127) can read 'content-size heuristic' even when an LLM path failed.
residual_if_not_resolved: Record actual path taken (llm_ok|llm_failed_fallback|no_adapter|heuristic) in FieldDiff reason and a run-level counter.
